description: ArgoCD application controller reconciliation latency percentiles, throughput, error rate, and work queue depth via Thanos Querier
technicalNotes: Reconciliation latency from argocd_app_reconcile histogram (aggregated across all apps). Error rate from controller-runtime reconcile errors in openshift-gitops namespace. Work queue depth from controller-runtime workqueue metrics. NaN/Inf histogram results default to 0. Namespace regex covers both openshift-gitops (Red Hat operator) and argocd (upstream) installations.
name: ArgoCD_Controller_Performance
